module_items.name: sigma0_le_three_prime_or_square_prime
module_items.proof_term:
by
  by_cases hprime : Nat.Prime r
  · exact Or.inl hprime
  · right
    rcases (Nat.not_prime_iff_exists_dvd_ne hr).mp hprime with ⟨d, hd, hd1, hdr⟩
    rcases hd with ⟨e, he⟩
    have hdvd : d ∣ r := ⟨e, he⟩
    have hd0 : d ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      subst d
      simp at he
      omega
    have he0 : e ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      subst e
      simp at he
      omega
    have hd2 : 2 ≤ d := by omega
    have he1 : e ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      subst e
      simp at he
      omega
    have he2 : 2 ≤ e := by omega
    have hder : d < r := by nlinarith
    have her : e < r := by nlinarith
    have hdprime : Nat.Prime d := by
      by_contra hdn
      rcases (Nat.not_prime_iff_exists_dvd_ne hd2).mp hdn with ⟨c, hcd, hc1, hcdne⟩
      have hc0 : c ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        subst c
        simp at hcd
      have hc2 : 2 ≤ c := by omega
      have hcle : c ≤ d := Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) hcd
      have hclt : c < d := lt_of_le_of_ne hcle hcdne
      have hcr : c ≠ r := by omega
      have hcrdvd : c ∣ r := dvd_trans hcd hdvd
      have hsub : ({1, c, d, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by
        intro x hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
        rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
        constructor
        · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
          · exact one_dvd r
          · exact hcrdvd
          · exact hdvd
          · exact dvd_rfl
        · omega
      have h1r : 1 ≠ r := by omega
      have hcard : ({1, c, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
        simp [Ne.symm hc1, hc1, Ne.symm hd1, hd1, hcdne, Ne.symm hcdne,
          hcr, Ne.symm hcr, hdr, Ne.symm hdr, h1r]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig
      have hfour : 4 ≤ r.divisors.card := by
        calc
          4 = ({1, c, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
          _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
      omega
    have hed : e = d := by
      by_contra hedne
      have hediv : e ∣ r := by
        use d
        omega
      have hsub : ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by
        intro x hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
        rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
        constructor
        · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
          · exact one_dvd r
          · exact hdvd
          · exact hediv
          · exact dvd_rfl
        · omega
      have h1r : 1 ≠ r := by omega
      have herne : e ≠ r := ne_of_lt her
      have hcard : ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
        simp [Ne.symm hd1, hd1, Ne.symm he1, he1, hedne, Ne.symm hedne,
          hdr, Ne.symm hdr, herne, Ne.symm herne, h1r]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig
      have hfour : 4 ≤ r.divisors.card := by
        calc
          4 = ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
          _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
      omega
    refine ⟨d, hdprime, ?_⟩
    simpa [hed, pow_two] using he
module_items.statement: ∀ r : ℕ, 2 ≤ r → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 → Nat.Prime r ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ r = p ^ 2

root_theorem.name: erdos647_shift5_classification
root_theorem.proof_term:
by
  intro n hn H h2520
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 5) ≤ 7 := by
    have hsub : n - 5 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - 5, hsub⟩
    have hm : f m ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd m) H
    dsimp [f, m] at hm
    omega
  rcases h2520 with ⟨q, hq⟩
  have hqpos : 1 ≤ q := by omega
  have h5div : 5 ∣ n - 5 := by
    apply Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.mpr
    omega
  let r : ℕ := (n - 5) / 5
  have hcancel := Nat.div_mul_cancel h5div
  have hr : n - 5 = 5 * r := by
    dsimp [r]
    omega
  have hrformula : r = 504 * q - 1 := by omega
  have hr2 : 2 ≤ r := by omega
  have hrmod : r % 5 = 4 := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime 5 r := by
    refine Nat.coprime_of_dvd ?_
    intro p hp hp5
    intro hpr
    have peq : p = 5 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hp (by norm_num)).mp hp5
    subst p
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpr
    omega
  have h5eq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 = 2 := by
    norm_num [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors]
  have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 * r) =
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
    ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop
  rw [hr] at shift
  rw [hmul, h5eq] at shift
  have hsig : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 := by omega
  have hclass := sigma0_le_three_prime_or_square_prime r hr2 hsig
  refine ⟨q, hq, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [r] using hrformula
  · simpa [r] using hsig
  · simpa [r] using hclass
root_theorem.statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → ∃ q : ℕ, n = 2520 * q ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = 504 * q - 1 ∧ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 ((n - 5) / 5) ≤ 3 ∧ (Nat.Prime ((n - 5) / 5) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = p ^ 2)

      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig

        calc
          4 = ({1, c, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
          _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub

        calc
          4 = ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm

        · omega
      have h1r : 1 ≠ r := by omega
      have herne : e ≠ r := ne_of_lt her
      have hcard : ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
        simp [Ne.symm hd1, hd1, Ne.symm he1, he1, hedne, Ne.symm hedne,
          hdr, Ne.symm hdr, herne, Ne.symm herne, h1r]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig
      have hfour : 4 ≤ r.divisors.card := by
        calc
          4 = ({1, d, e, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
          _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
      omega
    refine ⟨d, hdprime, ?_⟩
    simpa [hed, pow_two] using he
module_items.statement: ∀ r : ℕ, 2 ≤ r → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 → Nat.Prime r ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ r = p ^ 2

root_theorem.name: erdos647_shift5_classification
root_theorem.proof_term:
intro n hn H h2520
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 5) ≤ 7 := by
    have hsub : n - 5 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - 5, hsub⟩
    have hm : f m ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd m) H
    dsimp [f, m] at hm
    omega
  rcases h2520 with ⟨q, hq⟩
  have hqpos : 1 ≤ q := by omega
  have h5div : 5 ∣ n - 5 := by
    apply Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.mpr
    omega
  let r : ℕ := (n - 5) / 5
  have hcancel := Nat.div_mul_cancel h5div
  have hr : n - 5 = 5 * r := by
    dsimp [r]
    omega
  have hrformula : r = 504 * q - 1 := by omega
  have hr2 : 2 ≤ r := by omega
  have hrmod : r % 5 = 4 := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime 5 r := by
    refine Nat.coprime_of_dvd ?_
    intro p hp hp5
    intro hpr
    have peq : p = 5 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hp (by norm_num)).mp hp5
    subst p
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpr
    omega
  have h5eq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 = 2 := by
    norm_num [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors]
  have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 * r) =
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
    ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop
  rw [hr] at shift
  rw [hmul, h5eq] at shift
  have hsig : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 := by omega
  have hclass := sigma0_le_three_prime_or_square_prime r hr2 hsig
  refine ⟨q, hq, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [r] using hrformula
  · simpa [r] using hsig
  · simpa [r] using hclass
root_theorem.statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → ∃ q : ℕ, n = 2520 * q ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = 504 * q - 1 ∧ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 ((n - 5) / 5) ≤ 3 ∧ (Nat.Prime ((n - 5) / 5) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = p ^ 2)

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → ∃ q : ℕ, n = 2520 * q ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = 504 * q - 1 ∧ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 ((n - 5) / 5) ≤ 3 ∧ (Nat.Prime ((n - 5) / 5) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ (n - 5) / 5 = p ^ 2)

action.proof_term:
intro n hn H h2520
  have classify : ∀ s : ℕ, 2 ≤ s → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 3 →
      Nat.Prime s ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ s = p ^ 2 := by
    intro s hs hsig
    by_cases hprime : Nat.Prime s
    · exact Or.inl hprime
    · right
      rcases (Nat.not_prime_iff_exists_dvd_ne hs).mp hprime with ⟨d, hd, hd1, hds⟩
      rcases hd with ⟨e, he⟩
      have hdvd : d ∣ s := ⟨e, he⟩
      have hd0 : d ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        subst d
        simp at he
        omega
      have he0 : e ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        subst e
        simp at he
        omega
      have hd2 : 2 ≤ d := by omega
      have he1 : e ≠ 1 := by
        intro h
        subst e
        simp at he
        omega
      have he2 : 2 ≤ e := by omega
      have hdlt : d < s := by nlinarith
      have helt : e < s := by nlinarith
      have hdprime : Nat.Prime d := by
        by_contra hdn
        rcases (Nat.not_prime_iff_exists_dvd_ne hd2).mp hdn with ⟨c, hcd, hc1, hcdne⟩
        have hc0 : c ≠ 0 := by
          intro h
          subst c
          simp at hcd
        have hc2 : 2 ≤ c := by omega
        have hcle : c ≤ d := Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) hcd
        have hclt : c < d := lt_of_le_of_ne hcle hcdne
        have hcs : c ≠ s := by omega
        have hcrdvd : c ∣ s := dvd_trans hcd hdvd
        have hsub : ({1, c, d, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by
          intro x hx
          simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
          rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
          constructor
          · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact one_dvd s
            · exact hcrdvd
            · exact hdvd
            · exact dvd_rfl
          · omega
        have h1s : 1 ≠ s := by omega
        have hcard : ({1, c, d, s} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
          simp [Ne.symm hc1, hc1, Ne.symm hd1, hd1, hcdne, Ne.symm hcdne,
            hcs, Ne.symm hcs, hds, Ne.symm hds, h1s]
        rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig
        have hfour : 4 ≤ s.divisors.card := by
          calc
            4 = ({1, c, d, s} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
            _ ≤ s.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
        omega
      have hed : e = d := by
        by_contra hedne
        have hediv : e ∣ s := by
          use d
          omega
        have hsub : ({1, d, e, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by
          intro x hx
          simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
          rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
          constructor
          · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact one_dvd s
            · exact hdvd
            · exact hediv
            · exact dvd_rfl
          · omega
        have h1s : 1 ≠ s := by omega
        have hes : e ≠ s := ne_of_lt helt
        have hcard : ({1, d, e, s} : Finset ℕ).card = 4 := by
          simp [Ne.symm hd1, hd1, Ne.symm he1, he1, hedne, Ne.symm hedne,
            hds, Ne.symm hds, hes, Ne.symm hes, h1s]
        rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsig
        have hfour : 4 ≤ s.divisors.card := by
          calc
            4 = ({1, d, e, s} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
            _ ≤ s.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
        omega
      refine ⟨d, hdprime, ?_⟩
      simpa [hed, pow_two] using he
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 5) ≤ 7 := by
    have hsub : n - 5 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - 5, hsub⟩
    have hm : f m ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd m) H
    dsimp [f, m] at hm
    omega
  rcases h2520 with ⟨q, hq⟩
  have hqpos : 1 ≤ q := by omega
  have h5div : 5 ∣ n - 5 := by
    apply Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.mpr
    omega
  let r : ℕ := (n - 5) / 5
  have hcancel := Nat.div_mul_cancel h5div
  have hr : n - 5 = 5 * r := by
    dsimp [r]
    omega
  have hrformula : r = 504 * q - 1 := by omega
  have hr2 : 2 ≤ r := by omega
  have hrmod : r % 5 = 4 := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime 5 r := by
    refine Nat.coprime_of_dvd ?_
    intro p hp hp5
    intro hpr
    have peq : p = 5 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hp (by norm_num)).mp hp5
    subst p
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpr
    omega
  have h5eq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 = 2 := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    native_decide
  have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 * r) =
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 5 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
    ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop
  rw [hr] at shift
  rw [hmul, h5eq] at shift
  have hsig : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3 := by omega
  have hclass := classify r hr2 hsig
  refine ⟨q, hq, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · change r = 504 * q - 1
    exact hrformula
  · change ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r ≤ 3
    exact hsig
  · change Nat.Prime r ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ r = p ^ 2
    exact hclass

  have classify : ∀ s : ℕ, 2 ≤ s → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 3 →

        have hc0 : c ≠ 0 := by

        have hclt : c < d := lt_of_le_of_ne hcle hcdne

        have hsub : ({1, c, d, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by

        omega

        have hediv : e ∣ s := by

          omega
        have hsub : ({1, d, e, s} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ s.divisors := by

          rw [Nat.mem_divisors]

            · exact hediv

          · omega

    have hsub : n - 5 < n := by omega

    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by

    subst p

    omega

    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    native_decide

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
